title: SendingBatch
description: A staged, founder-approved batch of approved drafts. Sending is gradual (ramp), never 250/day at once. A batch must not send if any draft lacks unsubscribe/approval/personalization, a recipient is suppressed, the domain is unhealthy, or there is a bounce spike.

batch_size.description: Number of sends in this batch; bounded by the account ramp cap.

approved_by.description: Founder identity who approved the batch.

status.description: held = a gate failed (suppression / domain / bounce / missing approval).

hold_reason.description: Why the batch was held, if status=held.
